zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Scrope於1472年出生在英國越可爾博爾頓時，她的父親Sir Richard le Scrope30歲，母親Lady Alianor de Washbourne23歲。她於1496年與Sir Thomas Wyndham在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年之後在英國英格蘭諾福爾可費爾布利格，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其諾維其 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Scrope于1472年出生在英国越可爾博爾頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard le Scrope30岁，母亲Lady Alianor de Washbourne23岁。她于1496年与Sir Thomas Wyndham在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1505年之后在英国英格兰諾福爾可費爾布利格，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其諾維其 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Scrope was born in 1472, in Bolton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Richard le Scrope, was 30 and her mother, Lady Alianor de Washbourne, was 23. She married Sir Thomas Wyndham in 1496, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1505, in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Eng: Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Scrope est née en 1472, à Bolton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard le Scrope, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Alianor de Washbourne, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Wyndham en 1496, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1505, à Felbrigg, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Scrope 1472 in Bolton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard le Scrope 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Alianor de Washbourne 23. Sie hat 1496 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Wyndham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1505 in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Scrope è nata il nel 1472 nel Bolton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard le Scrope, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Alianor de Washbourne, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Wyndham nel 1496, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1505, nel Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치 노위치 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Scrope(이)가 1472년 영국 요르크실르 볼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard le Scrope(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alianor de Washbourne(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1496년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sir Thomas Wyndham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 프브리그에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치 노위치 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Wyndham em 1496, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Norwich Cathedral, Norwich, Norfolk, Eng: норвич кэтедраль, норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Scrope родилась в 1472 г. в местности болтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard le Scrope было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alianor de Washbourne, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Wyndham в 1496 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1505 г. в местности фелбриг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности норвич кэтедраль, норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
